rationale: This bus-parking fail hook has almost no overlap with Mob Control's DNA: the palette (green/red/blue) clashes with the signature royal purple + cyan + yellow, and the puzzle/parking mechanic doesn't telegraph aiming, multiplier gates, or mob growth — the core "satisfying crowd explosion" payoff is absent. Audience skews more puzzle/casual female than Mob Control's male-skewing strategy-casual base, and with only 1 creative from 1 advertiser at 258d freshness, there's no market validation to justify a costly reshoot. Skip unless reframed as a "fail-then-win" mob-shooting variant where the wrong gate choice causes the crash.
